description: A pop song with a soft female vocal over a pulsating synth lead, mellow piano, sustained synth brass, punchy kick, claps, tinny wide hi hats, and a high-pitched female vocal melody.
accompaniment: mellow piano, sustained synth brass, punchy kick, claps, tinny wide hi hats
tempo_and_rhythm: steady, rhythmic with punchy kicks and claps
vocal_presence: soft female vocal, high-pitched female vocal melody
